epistemic_stopping_layer.purpose: anti-regress boundary — stops admissibility recursion at governance floor
epistemic_stopping_layer.note: This layer does not require further validation. It is the stopping condition for consolidation window admissibility regress.

tasks.name: evaluator_neutrality_smoke
tasks.method: baseline vs substituted metric distribution comparison
tasks.pass_criterion: evaluator_confidence distribution consistent across original and substituted owners
tasks.notes: Topology collected under observation-only; neutrality not assessable in global NT-01 collapse.

tasks.name: substitution_replay_stability
tasks.method: re-run completed harness runs, compare replay_deterministic across baseline and substituted

tasks.name: hotspot_transferability
tasks.method: compare hotspot_id sets between original and substituted reviewer runs
tasks.notes: Topology collected under observation-only; no causal escalation permitted.

tasks.name: metric_usefulness_ranking
tasks.method: pairwise metric correlation after ≥6 harness runs
tasks.output: signal_classification per metric: decision_relevant | observational_only | historically_useful | high_cost_low_info
tasks.notes: cannot start until ≥6 harness runs with non-null metrics exist

mip_status.MIP-01: satisfied — admissibility definitions written for all 5 metrics in METRIC_INTERPRETABILITY_CONTRACT.md v0.2
mip_status.MIP-02: pending — causal attribution requires R49.x-1 (evaluator neutrality) result
mip_status.MIP-03: pending — cross-seed reproducibility requires actual harness runs (deterministic by design, must be verified)
mip_status.MIP-04: partial — per-claim event log required; initial runs may tag event_log_absent: true
mip_status.MIP-05: satisfied — base distributions documented in reviewer_profile_schema for home scenarios; cross-profile distributions are NT-06

metric_interpretability_preconditions.rationale: usefulness ranking ≠ interpretability legitimacy. A metric can be structurally valid and numerically stable but semantically inadmissible. Ranking before interpretability is established produces fabricated utility ordering.

preconditions.name: explainable
preconditions.criterion: a domain expert unfamiliar with the harness can articulate what a non-zero value means in governance terms
preconditions.blocks_if_absent: semantic fabrication — number exists but meaning is constructed post-hoc

preconditions.name: attributable
preconditions.criterion: a non-zero value can be traced to a specific reviewer action or claim, not harness artifact
preconditions.blocks_if_absent: causal fabrication — signal is real but cause is wrong

preconditions.name: reproducible
preconditions.criterion: same seed + same reviewer + same scenario produces the same value across independent runs
preconditions.blocks_if_absent: stochastic illusion — metric appears informative but is noise

preconditions.name: traceable
preconditions.criterion: each override event has a logged source (reviewer identity + decision point), not just a count
preconditions.blocks_if_absent: provenance collapse — count exists but cannot be audited

preconditions.name: understandable
preconditions.criterion: the entropy calculation is documented with its base distribution; a low value and a high value each have an articulated interpretation
preconditions.blocks_if_absent: observer hallucination — value is computed correctly but reader assigns arbitrary meaning

tasks.name: null_semantics_audit
tasks.method: inspect all checkpoint consumers for implicit null conversions, classified by NT-01..NT-06
tasks.pass_criterion: zero implicit null conversions, or each documented with explicit null_type and rationale
anti_patterns: null → 0 (metric averaging — collapses NT-01/NT-02/NT-06 into false zero)
unknown → high (evaluator_confidence default — NT-05 recursive null ignored)
null drop in aggregation denominators (NT-03/NT-04 silently excluded)
treating NT-03 semantic null as pass or fail without reviewer disposition

findings.description: drift_result 'pending' conflated NT-01/NT-06 — changed to typed 'not_measured'
all runs missing null_type/null_status — added NT-06/not_measured to checkpoint and PS1
Get-SubstitutionInterpretation only received $Metrics — refactored to receive $Run and return null_status
completion counter excluded 'pending'/'dry_run' — updated to full 6-term null_status vocabulary
harness default 'medium' confidence unmarked — added evaluator_confidence_provenance field; default tagged as 'harness_default_NT-05'
dryrun drift_result 'dry_run' mixed into metrics — changed to 'premature', null_status separated

tasks.notes: 6 findings resolved; dryrun verified: result=premature, null_type=NT-06 correctly propagated

tasks.name: null_ontology_instantiation
tasks.method: author governance/NULL_ONTOLOGY.md defining NT-01..NT-06 with signals, treatment, fail-closed rules, sparse-verification connection
tasks.pass_criterion: all 6 null types defined with distinguishing signals and anti-patterns; cross-type comparison table present; sparse-verification connection documented
tasks.notes: prerequisite for r49x-5 — defines what the audit must check; also informs r49x-4 metric ranking (NT-02 structural nulls are topology boundaries, not coverage failures)

epistemic_compression_test.criterion: reviewer unfamiliar with framework reconstructs governance state from ≤3 artifacts in ≤15 minutes

inflation_risk_signals.taxonomy_compression_debt_note: ontology too complex for runtime flat view; compression layer deferred until ontology stable enough to compress without flattening critical boundaries

r50_constraint_notes.stable_candidate_definition: absence of detected ontology violations — NOT evidence of true substitutability
r50_constraint_notes.accumulation_laundering_guard: accumulation cannot override admissibility uncertainty: 100 admissibility-weak runs < 1 admissibility-strong run; evidence volume must not be mistaken for evidence strength
accumulation_laundering_examples: 3 seeds all pass → sample space too small
hotspot overlap 70% → topology may be too narrow
evaluator neutral → neutrality definition not yet stable
r50_constraint_notes.positive_epistemic_semantics: deferred to R50; confidence accumulation protocol preferred over positive stability proof; direction: how much bounded non-failure evidence has accumulated under explicit assumptions

ontology_phase_note: ontology expansion complete for this consolidation window: NULL_ONTOLOGY + METRIC_INTERPRETABILITY_CONTRACT + EPISTEMIC_BASE_ASSUMPTIONS. Next phase requires runtime evidence, not more ontology.
